summary: First testing iteration for FAMMY AI backend (4 endpoints powered by Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations). Created /app/backend/tests/test_ai_endpoints.py with 14 pytest cases covering health, root info, suggest-task (3 Italian titles + edge cases), weekly-summary (full payload + minimal), chat (single + multi-turn context + history), and gift-ideas (full + missing field). ALL 14 TESTS PASSED in ~60s. Multi-turn context preservation confirmed: assistant correctly recalls 'Tommaso' across turns. JSON shape stable across all endpoints. Frontend testing was explicitly skipped per request (Supabase Google OAuth cannot be automated).

minor.issue: Multi-turn history replay only replays user messages back into a fresh LlmChat; assistant turns are not replayed. This works for short, fact-recall continuity (verified) but the model may not see its own prior phrasing, which can subtly drift tone/answers over long sessions. Documented in code comment - acceptable trade-off for latency, but worth noting.

to_list(20) is used to fetch the last messages but messages are sorted ASC by created_at - this returns the FIRST 20 messages, not the latest 20. For long sessions context will fall behind. Should be sort desc + reverse, or use a windowed query.
Empty title is accepted (Pydantic doesn't enforce min_length). Returns category 'other' which is graceful, but a 422 with min_length=1 would be cleaner.

allow_origins=['*'] combined with allow_credentials=True is not spec-compliant; browsers will reject credentialed requests. Not blocking for current Supabase-based frontend but should be tightened before prod.

action_items: Optional: Fix chat history windowing - sort by created_at DESC, limit, then reverse, so the latest 10 user turns are replayed (currently it's the first 10 of the session).
Optional: Add Field(min_length=1) on SuggestTaskRequest.title and ChatRequest.message for cleaner 422 instead of best-effort LLM behaviour on empty strings.
Optional: Tighten CORS allow_origins to the production frontend domain when not using credentials=True.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 396 lines - still under the 700-line threshold, but each AI endpoint has duplicated try/except + extract_json + session-id boilerplate. Extract a helper run_llm_json(system, user_text, session_prefix) to DRY up routes 2-4.

Chat history pagination bug: db.chat_messages.find(...).sort('created_at', 1).to_list(20) returns the OLDEST 20, not the newest. Replay logic in /api/ai/chat will degrade once a session has >10 user turns.

extract_json regex uses non-greedy {.*?} in the fenced-code branch but greedy {.*} in the fallback branch. With nested JSON objects (e.g., highlights array of objects) the fenced branch may stop at the first inner }. Consider a proper brace-balancing parser.

All four endpoints catch broad Exception and return 500 with the raw exception string in detail. This can leak internal info (API key fragments, mongo connection strings on certain failures). Log internally; return a generic message.
No request-level timeout / retry on LlmChat.send_message: a hanging upstream will pin a worker. Wrap with asyncio.wait_for(..., timeout=N).
test_credentials: Not applicable - AI endpoints are stateless and only require EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (already in /app/backend/.env). Frontend uses Supabase Google OAuth which cannot be automated.
seed_data_creation: 14 test chat messages were created during testing under user_ids prefixed with 'TEST_user_' / session_ids prefixed with 'TEST_session_'/'TEST_hist_'. Cleaned up after run: db.chat_messages.deleteMany({user_id: /^TEST_/}) removed 10 documents.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend AI endpoints are fully verified and green. If new AI features are added, follow the same pytest pattern in /app/backend/tests/test_ai_endpoints.py. Multi-turn chat test uses a name+age fact ('Tommaso, 6 anni') and checks the second reply mentions 'tommaso' (case-insensitive). REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is loaded from /app/frontend/.env via python-dotenv since the Vite project does not export it to the shell. Frontend tests intentionally skipped - Supabase Google OAuth requires real browser session.
rca of the issue: No bugs found requiring RCA. All 14 backend tests passed on first run. Only environment quirk: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is defined inside /app/frontend/.env (Vite project) and is not exported to the shell, so the test file explicitly reads it via dotenv_values.
